LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ROBIN CHEEVERS DURFEE'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND.
